title: _Beautiful-Survival_
description: Optimized Minecraft with Some QoL Improvements
body:
7/4/23:
If it is not obvious, this modpack is discontinued and outdated, don't use this.
Vulkan Optimized or Fabulously Optimized is much better than my garbage modpack.






Making survival fun and enjoyably as well as optimizing the game for Minecraft. This makes Minecraft run better for lower end machines and to keep the vanilla feel of the game.
I do not own any of these mods and you should support the creators of the mods.
